response.summary: משחק פלטפורמה קצר עם 3 collectibles ובוס קטן בסוף שיורה לכיוון שהוא נע בו.
notes: The boss uses a custom Script to track its movement direction and fire a projectile.
The projectile is a hidden hazard entity that gets repositioned and launched by the boss script.
Collect all 3 items and avoid the boss's shots to reach the goal.

project.name: Boss Shooter Platformer
project.description: Short platformer with a shooting boss.

scenes.name: Level 1
scenes.notes: Main level containing platforms, collectibles, and the boss.
